description_long: This is a large, two-story residential house with a symmetrical facade and a steep, gabled roof. The exterior is predominantly light-colored, featuring multiple large windows arranged in neat rows, and a spacious front porch with steps leading up to the main entrance. The property is surrounded by manicured hedges and includes a circular driveway, a backyard swimming pool, and a patio area. Mature trees and landscaped greenery line one side of the house, providing privacy and shade. The rear of the house opens to a generous lawn and pool area, with additional access points and outdoor seating. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and modern architectural elements, with a focus on symmetry and outdoor living spaces.
description: A large, two-story house with a gabled roof, symmetrical windows, a front porch, and landscaped grounds featuring a pool and circular driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, front porch with steps, circular driveway, and manicured hedges.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard pool, patio, and symmetrical window arrangement across both stories.
description_view_2: Side view with visible trees, steps leading to the backyard, and a clear look at the pool and patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway entrance, hedges, and the side elevation of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with wide steps, covered porch, and supporting columns
